title: Design data component declaration
description: Layer 1 structural schema for a component declaration. Semantic cross-reference rules (component-name-exists, component-variant-valid, etc.) are Layer 2.

$id.description: Canonical identifier for this component declaration.

name.description: Machine identifier (kebab-case). Must match the value used in token name-object 'component' fields.

description.description: Plain-text description of the component's purpose.

slots.description: Named content injection points. See spec/component-format.md#slots.

anatomy.description: Named visible parts of the component. Full spec in spec/anatomy-format.md (Phase 6.2).

states.description: Per-component state declarations. Full spec in spec/state-model.md (Phase 6.3).

tokenBindings.description: Tokens this component uses, including foundation/structure tokens not scoped to the component in their name-object. See spec/component-format.md#token-bindings (Phase 6.7).

documentBlocks.description: Typed prose blocks for this component. See spec/document-blocks.md (Phase 9).

accessibility.description: Semantic accessibility vocabulary for this component. See spec/accessibility.md (Phase 7).

category.description: Category id from @adobe/design-system-registry categories.json. Advisory validation via SPEC-034.

documentationUrl.description: URL of the component's documentation page.

optionsMap.description: Component API options. Each key is a camelCase option name; each value is an option descriptor.

optionDescriptor.description: JSON Schema-compatible descriptor for a single component option. Standard JSON Schema keywords (type, enum, default, description, pattern, minimum, maximum, items, properties, etc.) are all permitted.

default.description: Default value when the option is not specified.

description.description: Plain-text description of what the option controls.

$ref.description: Reference to a shared type schema.

name.description: Slot identifier. Should come from the canonical slot vocabulary.

description.description: What content belongs in this slot.

required.description: Whether consumers must populate this slot.

anatomyPart.description: Named visible part of a component. Full spec in spec/anatomy-format.md (Phase 6.2).

contains.description: Informative: anatomy part names nested within this part.

documentBlocks.description: Typed prose blocks for this anatomy part. See spec/document-blocks.md (Phase 9).

stateDeclaration.description: Per-component state declaration. Full spec in spec/state-model.md.

trigger.description: 'prop' for persistent prop-driven states (isDisabled); 'interaction' for runtime states (hover, focus, pressed).

precedence.description: Resolution precedence; higher integer wins when multiple states are active simultaneously.

layered.description: true for states that compose with others (e.g. focus ring layered over hover).

announce.description: Screen-reader announcement hint for this state transition. See spec/accessibility.md.

communicates.description: Semantic meaning conveyed to AT when this state is active (e.g. 'expanded', 'disabled'). See spec/accessibility.md.

blocksInteraction.description: Whether this state prevents all user interaction. See spec/accessibility.md.

tokenBinding.description: A single token usage binding on a component declaration.

token.description: Token name string. MUST resolve to a known token in the dataset (rule SPEC-027).

context.description: Human-readable label for how this token is used in the component (maps to Figma Token Group label).

lifecycle.description: Version lifecycle metadata, mirroring the token lifecycle pattern.

introduced.description: Spec version when this component declaration was added (e.g. '1.0.0-draft').

deprecated.description: Spec version when this component was deprecated. Truthy = deprecated.

deprecatedComment.description: Human-readable explanation of the deprecation and migration path.

replacedBy.description: name value(s) of the replacement component(s).
